\tzpentry{ID4488}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4488 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:confinement-scaling} \tau_c \;\sim\; \frac{R^2}{\chi_{\perp}} \left(\frac{B_{\mathrm{toroidal}}}{B_{\mathrm{poloidal}}}\right)^2 \exp\!\left(\frac{\mathcal{H}_M}{k_B T}\right), \end{equation}
